sectiondef.header: Set Bus Context MIPI I3C Specification v1.Y Minor Version (SETBUSCON)

listitem.para:
CONTEXT[5]: I3C Specification Editorial Revision (within Minor Version)
0: Version 1.Y.0
1: Version 1.Y.1 or greater

CONTEXT[4]: I3C Specification Family
0: MIPI I3C Specification
1: MIPI I3C Basic Specification

CONTEXT[3:0]: I3C Specification Minor Version (v1.Y)
0: Illegal, do not use (see Note below) (It would encode v1.0, but SETBUSCON was not available in I3C Basic v1.0)
1-15: Version 1.1 - Version 1.15

briefdescription.para: I3C Specification Minor Version shift mask.
I3C Specification Minor Version (v1.Y)

detaileddescription.para: Set the context bits for SETBUSCON

parameterdescription.para: I3C Specification Minor Version Number

briefdescription.para: MIPI I3C Specification.
MIPI I3C Basic Specification.
Version 1.Y.0.
Version 1.Y.1 or greater.

sectiondef.header: Set Bus Context Other Standards Organizations (SETBUSCON)

briefdescription.para: JEDEC Sideband.

detaileddescription.para: JEDEC SideBand Bus device, compliant to JESD403 Specification v1.0 or later.

briefdescription.para: MCTP.

detaileddescription.para: MCTP for system manageability (conforming to the content protocol defined in the MCTP I3C Transport Binding Specification, released by DMTF, version 1.0 or newer)

briefdescription.para: ETSI.

detaileddescription.para: ETSI for Secure Smart Platform Devices used for mobile networks authentication and other ETSI security functions in mobile ecosystem

briefdescription.para: Remove all I3C Devices from Test Mode.
Indicates that I3C Devices shall return a random 32-bit value in the PID during the Dynamic Address Assignment procedure.
Defining byte values for ENTTM.
GETSTATUS Format 1.
GETSTATUS Format 2.
Indicate which format of GETSTATUS to use.
Target status.
PRECR - Alternate status format describing Controller-capable device.
Invalid defining byte.
Defining byte values for GETSTATUS Format 2.
GETMXDS Format 1.
GETMXDS Format 2.
GETMXDS Format 3.
Indicate which format of getmxds to use.
Standard Target Write/Read speed parameters, and optional Maximum Read Turnaround Time.
Delay parameters for a Controller-capable Device, and it's expected Activity State during a Controller Handoff.
Invalid defining byte.
Enum for I3C Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) Format 3 Defining Byte Values.
GETCAPS Format 1.
GETCAPS Format 2.
Indicate which format of GETCAPS to use.
Standard Target capabilities and features.
Fixed 32b test pattern.
Controller handoff capabilities and features.
Virtual Target capabilities and features.
Debug-capable Device capabilities and features.
Invalid defining byte.
Enum for I3C Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) Format 2 Defining Byte Values.
No Reset on Target Reset Pattern.
Reset the I3C Peripheral Only.
Reset the Whole Target.
Debug Network Adapter Reset.
Virtual Target Detect.
Return Time to Reset Peripheral.
Return Time to Reset Whole Target.
Return Time for Debug Network Adapter Reset.
Return Virtual Target Indication.
Enum for I3C Reset Action (RSTACT) Defining Byte Values.
Test if I3C CCC payload is for broadcast.

detaileddescription.para: This tests if the CCC payload is for broadcast.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the CCC payload.
if payload target is broadcast
if payload target is direct

briefdescription.para: Get BCR from a target.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to get BCR (Bus Characteristic Register) from target device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to the BCR payload structure.

briefdescription.para: Get DCR from a target.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to get DCR (Device Characteristic Register) from target device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to the DCR payload structure.

briefdescription.para: Get PID from a target.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to get PID (Provisioned ID) from target device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to the PID payload structure.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast RSTACT to reset I3C Peripheral (Format 1).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to broadcast Target Reset Action (RSTACT) to all connected targets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
What reset action to perform.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, enum i3c_ccc_rstact_defining_byte action, bool get, uint8_t *data)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_rstact

briefdescription.para: Single target RSTACT to reset I3C Peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do Target Reset Action (RSTACT) to one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
What reset action to perform.
True if a get, False if set
Pointer to RSTACT payload received.

briefdescription.para: Single target RSTACT to reset I3C Peripheral (Format 2).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do Target Reset Action (RSTACT, format 2) to one target. This is a Direct Write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
What reset action to perform.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, enum i3c_ccc_rstact_defining_byte action, uint8_t *data)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_rstact_fmt3

briefdescription.para: Single target RSTACT to reset I3C Peripheral (Format 3).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do Target Reset Action (RSTACT, format 3) to one target. This is a Direct Read.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
What reset action to perform.
Pointer to RSTACT payload received.

briefdescription.para: Reset dynamic addresses for a targets.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to reset a dynamic addresses of a targets.

simplesect.para: This should not be used by devices that support I3C v1.0 and this shall not be used for devices that support I3C v1.1 or later.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor where the device is configured with a dynamic address.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast RSTDAA to reset dynamic addresses for all targets.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to reset dynamic addresses of all connected targets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Set Dynamic Address from Static Address for a target.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETDASA (Set Dynamic Address from Static Address) for a particular target.
Note this does not update target with the new dynamic address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor where the device is configured with a static address.
Struct of the Dynamic address

briefdescription.para: Set New Dynamic Address for a target.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETNEWDA(Set New Dynamic Address) for a particular target.
Note this does not update target with the new dynamic address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor where the device is configured with a dynamic address.
Struct of the Dynamic address

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *controller, bool enable, struct i3c_ccc_events *events)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_events_all_set

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENEC/DISEC to enable/disable target events.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to broadcast Target Events Command to enable or disable target events (ENEC/DISEC).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
ENEC if true, DISEC if false.
Pointer to the event struct.

briefdescription.para: Direct CCC ENEC/DISEC to enable/disable target events.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to send Target Events Command to enable or disable target events (ENEC/DISEC) on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
ENEC if true, DISEC if false.
Pointer to the event struct.

briefdescription.para: Direct ENTAS to set the Activity State.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to broadcast Activity State Command on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Activity State level

briefdescription.para: Direct ENTAS0.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS0 setting the minimum bus activity level to 1us on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Direct ENTAS1.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS1 setting the minimum bus activity level to 100us on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Direct ENTAS2.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS2 setting the minimum bus activity level to 2ms on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Direct ENTAS3.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS3 setting the minimum bus activity level to 50ms on a single target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTAS to set the Activity State.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to broadcast Activity State Command.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Activity State level

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTAS0.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS0 setting the minimum bus activity level to 1us

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTAS1.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS1 setting the minimum bus activity level to 100us

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTAS2.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS2 setting the minimum bus activity level to 2ms

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTAS3.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTAS3 setting the minimum bus activity level to 50ms

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast SETMWL to Set Maximum Write Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETMWL (Set Maximum Write Length) to all connected targets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Pointer to SETMWL payload.

briefdescription.para: Single target SETMWL to Set Maximum Write Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETMWL (Set Maximum Write Length) to one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to SETMWL payload.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMWL to Get Maximum Write Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMWL (Get Maximum Write Length) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMWL payload.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *controller, const struct i3c_ccc_mrl *mrl, bool has_ibi_size)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_setmrl_all

briefdescription.para: Broadcast SETMRL to Set Maximum Read Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETMRL (Set Maximum Read Length) to all connected targets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Pointer to SETMRL payload.
True if also sending the optional IBI payload size. False if not sending.

briefdescription.para: Single target SETMRL to Set Maximum Read Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do SETMRL (Set Maximum Read Length) to one target.
Note this uses the BCR of the target to determine whether to send the optional IBI payload size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to SETMRL payload.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMRL to Get Maximum Read Length.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMRL (Get Maximum Read Length) of one target.
Note this uses the BCR of the target to determine whether to send the optional IBI payload size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMRL payload.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast ENTTM.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do ENTTM (Enter Test Mode) to all devices

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Defining Byte for ENTTM.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getstatus *status, enum i3c_ccc_getstatus_fmt fmt, enum i3c_ccc_getstatus_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getstatus

briefdescription.para: Single target GETSTATUS to Get Target Status.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETSTATUS (Get Target Status) of one target.
Note this uses the BCR of the target to determine whether to send the optional IBI payload size.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETSTATUS payload.
Which GETSTATUS to use.
Defining Byte if using format 2.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETSTATUS to Get Target Status (Format 1).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETSTATUS (Get Target Status, format 1) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETSTATUS payload.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getstatus *status, enum i3c_ccc_getstatus_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getstatus_fmt2

briefdescription.para: Single target GETSTATUS to Get Target Status (Format 2).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETSTATUS (Get Target Status, format 2) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETSTATUS payload.
Defining Byte for GETSTATUS format 2.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getcaps *caps, enum i3c_ccc_getcaps_fmt fmt, enum i3c_ccc_getcaps_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getcaps

briefdescription.para: Single target GETCAPS to Get Target Status.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETCAPS (Get Capabilities) of one target.
This should only be supported if Advanced Capabilities Bit of the BCR is set

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETCAPS payload.
Which GETCAPS to use.
Defining Byte if using format 2.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETCAPS to Get Capabilities (Format 1).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETCAPS (Get Capabilities, format 1) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETCAPS payload.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getcaps *caps, enum i3c_ccc_getcaps_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getcaps_fmt2

briefdescription.para: Single target GETCAPS to Get Capabilities (Format 2).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETCAPS (Get Capabilities, format 2) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETCAPS payload.
Defining Byte for GETCAPS format 2.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, uint8_t id, uint8_t *payload, size_t len)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_setvendor

briefdescription.para: Single target to Set Vendor / Standard Extension CCC.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to set Vendor / Standard Extension CCC of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Vendor CCC ID.
Pointer to payload.
Length of payload. 0 if no payload.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, uint8_t id, uint8_t *payload, size_t len, size_t *num_xfer)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getvendor

briefdescription.para: Single target to Get Vendor / Standard Extension CCC.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to get Vendor / Standard Extension CCC of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Vendor CCC ID.
Pointer to payload.
Maximum Expected Length of the payload
Length of the received payload

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, uint8_t id, uint8_t defbyte, uint8_t *payload, size_t len, size_t *num_xfer)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getvendor_defbyte

briefdescription.para: Single target to Get Vendor / Standard Extension CCC with a defining byte.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to get Vendor / Standard Extension CCC of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Vendor CCC ID.
Defining Byte
Pointer to payload.
Maximum Expected Length of the payload
Length of the received payload

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *controller, uint8_t id, uint8_t *payload, size_t len)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_setvendor_all

briefdescription.para: Broadcast Set Vendor / Standard Extension CCC.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to broadcast Vendor / Standard Extension CCC

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Vendor CCC ID.
Pointer to payload.
Length of payload. 0 if no payload.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast SETAASA to set all target's dynamic address to their static address.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to set dynamic addresses of all connected targets to their static address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getmxds *caps, enum i3c_ccc_getmxds_fmt fmt, enum i3c_ccc_getmxds_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getmxds

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMXDS to Get Max Data Speed.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMXDS (Get Max Data Speed) of one target.
This should only be supported if Max Data Speed Limit Bit of the BCR is set

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMXDS payload.
Which GETMXDS to use.
Defining Byte if using format 3.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMXDS to Get Max Data Speed (Format 1).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMXDS (Get Max Data Speed, format 1) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMXDS payload.

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMXDS to Get Max Data Speed (Format 2).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMXDS (Get Max Data Speed, format 2) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMXDS payload.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i3c_device_desc *target, union i3c_ccc_getmxds *caps, enum i3c_ccc_getmxds_defbyte defbyte)
memberdef.name: i3c_ccc_do_getmxds_fmt3

briefdescription.para: Single target GETMXDS to Get Max Data Speed (Format 3).

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to do GETMXDS (Get Max Data Speed, format 3) of one target.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to GETMXDS payload.
Defining Byte for GETMXDS format 3.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast DEFTGTS.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Pointer to the deftgts payload.

briefdescription.para: Broadcast SETBUSCON to set the bus context.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to set the bus context of all connected targets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the controller device driver instance.
Pointer to context byte values
Length of the context buffer

briefdescription.para: Direct GETACCCR for Controller Handoff.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function to allow for the Active Controller to pass the Controller Role to a Secondary Controller. The returned address should match it's dynamic address along with odd parity.
Note it is up to the caller to verify the correct returned address

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the target device descriptor.
Pointer to the address returned by the secondary controller.

briefdescription.para: Maximum CCC ID for broadcast.
Enable Events Command.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Disable Events Command.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Activity State.

parameterdescription.para: Desired activity state
True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Activity State 0.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Activity State 1.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Activity State 2.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Activity State 3.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Reset Dynamic Address Assignment (Broadcast)
Enter Dynamic Address Assignment (Broadcast)
Define List of Targets (Broadcast)
Set Max Write Length (Broadcast or Direct)

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Set Max Read Length (Broadcast or Direct)

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter Test Mode (Broadcast)
Set Bus Context (Broadcast)
Data Transfer Ending Procedure Control.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Enter HDR Mode (HDR-DDR) (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 0 (HDR-DDR) (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 1 (HDR-TSP) (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 2 (HDR-TSL) (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 3 (HDR-BT) (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 4 (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 5 (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 6 (Broadcast)
Enter HDR Mode 7 (Broadcast)
Exchange Timing Information (Broadcast or Direct)

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Set All Addresses to Static Addresses (Broadcast)
Target Reset Action.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Define List of Group Address (Broadcast)
Reset Group Address.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.

briefdescription.para: Multi-Lane Data Transfer Control (Broadcast)
Vendor/Standard Extension.

parameterdescription.para: True if broadcast, false if direct.
Extension ID.

briefdescription.para: Reset Dynamic Address (Direct)

simplesect.para: This should not be used by devices that support I3C v1.0 and this shall not be used for devices that support I3C v1.1 or later.

briefdescription.para: Set Dynamic Address from Static Address (Direct)
Set New Dynamic Address (Direct)
Get Max Write Length (Direct)
Get Max Read Length (Direct)
Get Provisioned ID (Direct)
Get Bus Characteristics Register (Direct)
Get Device Characteristics Register (Direct)
Get Device Status (Direct)
Get Accept Controller Role (Direct)
Set Bridge Targets (Direct)
Get Max Data Speed (Direct)
Get Optional Feature Capabilities (Direct)
Set Route (Direct)
Device to Device(s) Tunneling Control (Direct)
Get Exchange Timing Information (Direct)
Set Group Address (Direct)
Enable Events (ENEC) - Target Interrupt Requests.
Enable Events (ENEC) - Controller Role Requests.
Enable Events (ENEC) - Hot-Join Event.
Disable Events (DISEC) - Target Interrupt Requests.
Disable Events (DISEC) - Controller Role Requests.
Disable Events (DISEC) - Hot-Join Event.
Events - Target Interrupt Requests.
Events - Controller Role Requests.
Events - Hot-Join Event.
Bitmask for all events.
GETSTATUS Format 1 - Protocol Error bit.
GETSTATUS Format 1 - Activity Mode bitmask.
GETSTATUS Format 1 - Activity Mode.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Activity Mode from GETSTATUS Format 1 value obtained via GETSTATUS.

parameterdescription.para: GETSTATUS Format 1 value

briefdescription.para: GETSTATUS Format 1 - Activity Mode Unable to participate in Controller Handoff.
GETSTATUS Format 1 - Number of Pending Interrupts bitmask.
GETSTATUS Format 1 - Number of Pending Interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Number of Pending Interrupts from GETSTATUS Format 1 value obtained via GETSTATUS.

parameterdescription.para: GETSTATUS Format 1 value

briefdescription.para: GETSTATUS Format 2 - PERCR - Deep Sleep Detected bit.
GETSTATUS Format 2 - PERCR - Handoff Delay NACK.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Default Max Sustained Data Rate.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - 8MHz Max Sustained Data Rate.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - 6MHz Max Sustained Data Rate.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - 4MHz Max Sustained Data Rate.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - 2MHz Max Sustained Data Rate.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround <= 8ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround <= 9ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround <= 10ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround <= 11ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround <= 12ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Clock to Data Turnaround > 12ns.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxWr - Optional Defining Byte Support.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - Max Sustained Data Rate bitmask.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxWr - Max Sustained Data Rate.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Max Sustained Data Rate value from GETMXDS maxWr value obtained via GETMXDS.

parameterdescription.para: GETMXDS maxWr value.

briefdescription.para: Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxRd - Write-to-Read Permits Stop Between.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxRd - Clock to Data Turnaround bitmask.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxRd - Clock to Data Turnaround.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Clock to Data Turnaround value from GETMXDS maxRd value obtained via GETMXDS.

parameterdescription.para: GETMXDS maxRd value.

briefdescription.para: Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxRd - Max Sustained Data Rate bitmask.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - maxRd - Max Sustained Data Rate.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Max Sustained Data Rate value from GETMXDS maxRd value obtained via GETMXDS.

parameterdescription.para: GETMXDS maxRd value.

briefdescription.para: Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - CRDHLY1 - Set Bus Activity State bit shift value.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - CRDHLY1 - Controller Handoff Activity State bitmask.
Get Max Data Speed (GETMXDS) - CRDHLY1 - Controller Handoff Activity State.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Controller Handoff Activity State value from GETMXDS value obtained via GETMXDS.

parameterdescription.para: GETMXDS value.

briefdescription.para: Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-DDR mode bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-TSP mode bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-TSL mode bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-BT mode bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) - HDR Mode.

detaileddescription.para: Get the bit corresponding to HDR mode.

parameterdescription.para: HDR mode

briefdescription.para: Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 0.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 1.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 2.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 3.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 4.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 5.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 6.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR Mode 7.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-DDR Write Abort bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-DDR Abort CRC bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Group Address Capabilities bitmask.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Group Address Capabilities.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Group Address Capabilities value from GETCAPS Format 1 value obtained via GETCAPS.

parameterdescription.para: GETCAPS2 value.

briefdescription.para: Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - I3C 1.x Specification Version bitmask.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - I3C 1.x Specification Version.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain I3C 1.x Specification Version value from GETCAPS Format 1 value obtained via GETCAPS.

parameterdescription.para: GETCAPS2 value.

briefdescription.para: Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Multi-Lane Data Transfer Support bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Device to Device Transfer (D2DXFER) Support bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Device to Device Transfer (D2DXFER) IBI Capable bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Defining Byte Support in GETCAPS bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - Defining Byte Support in GETSTATUS bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - HDR-BT CRC-32 Support bit.
Get Optional Feature Capabilities Byte 3 (GETCAPS) Format 1 - IBI MDB Support for Pending Read Notification bit.
Get Fixed Test Pattern (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Fixed Test Pattern Byte 1.
Get Fixed Test Pattern (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Fixed Test Pattern Byte 2.
Get Fixed Test Pattern (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Fixed Test Pattern Byte 3.
Get Fixed Test Pattern (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Fixed Test Pattern Byte 4.
Get Fixed Test Pattern (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Fixed Test Pattern Word in Big Endian.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Hot-Join Support.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Group Management Support.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Multi-Lane Support.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - In-Band Interrupt Support.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Controller Pass-Back.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Deep Sleep Capable.
Get Controller Handoff Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Deep Sleep Capable.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP1 - Virtual Target Type bitmask.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP1 - Virtual Target Type.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Virtual Target Type value from VTCAP1 value obtained via GETCAPS format 2 VTCAP def byte.

parameterdescription.para: VTCAP1 value.

briefdescription.para: Get Virtual Target Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Side Effects.
Get Virtual Target Capabilities Byte 1 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Shared Peripheral Detect.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP2 - Interrupt Requests bitmask.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP2 - Interrupt Requests.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Interrupt Requests value from VTCAP2 value obtained via GETCAPS format 2 VTCAP def byte.

parameterdescription.para: VTCAP2 value.

briefdescription.para: Get Virtual Target Capabilities Byte 2 (GETCAPS) Format 2 - Address Remapping.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP2 - Bus Context and Condition bitmask.
Get Capabilities (GETCAPS) - VTCAP2 - Bus Context and Condition.

detaileddescription.para: Obtain Bus Context and Condition value from VTCAP2 value obtained via GETCAPS format 2 VTCAP def byte.

parameterdescription.para: VTCAP2 value.

briefdescription.para: I3C Common Command Codes.
